name: Butter Nut Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the brown sugar, cheese, and softened butter in a bowl using an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Add milk, flavorings, and egg to the mixture. Beat well to combine.
3. Gradually add flour, baking powder, and salt. Mix until fully incorporated.
4. Divide the dough into four equal portions. Work with one portion at a time.
5. Roll each portion of dough into thin rounds (about 1/8-inch thick) on a floured surface. Wrap the remaining dough and refrigerate it until ready to use.
6. Place the cookie rounds about an inch apart on ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Cool the cookies completely on wire racks before decorating.
Repeat with the remaining dough portions. Once cooled, combine powdered sugar, water, and food coloring to create icing. Pipe the icing onto the cooled cookies using a decorating bag fitted with a small, round tip.
